title: × gymnanacamptis evequei
intro: × Gymnanacamptis evequei is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between Gymnadenia conopsea and Nigritella rubra. It is native to the mountains of Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of × Gymnanacamptis evequei are said to include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as having antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. However, there is limited information available on the herbal preparations and uses of this plant, and more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
